mapper.select:
SELECT ro.id, ro.order_no AS orderNo, ro.price AS fee, ro.status,
p.name AS patientName, d.name AS doctorName, dep.name AS departmentName,
s.work_date AS visitDate, s.time_slot AS timeSlot
FROM register_order ro
LEFT JOIN pmi_patient p ON ro.user_id = p.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON ro.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN department dep ON d.dept_id = dep.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ro.schedule_id = s.id
WHERE ro.id = #{id}

SELECT
ro.id, ro.order_no AS orderNo, ro.price AS fee, ro.status,
d.name AS doctorName,
dep.name AS departmentName,
s.work_date AS visitDate,
s.time_slot AS timeSlot
FROM register_order ro
LEFT JOIN doctor d ON ro.doctor_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN department dep ON d.dept_id = dep.id
LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ro.schedule_id = s.id
WHERE ro.user_id = #{patientId}
ORDER BY ro.create_time DESC

SELECT d.name AS deptName, COUNT(r.id) AS total FROM register_order r LEFT JOIN doctor doc ON r.doctor_id = doc.id LEFT JOIN department d ON doc.dept_id = d.id WHERE r.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT doc.name AS doctorName, COUNT(r.id) AS total FROM register_order r LEFT JOIN doctor doc ON r.doctor_id = doc.id WHERE DATE(r.create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY doc.id ORDER BY total DESC
